member.summary: Defines a handler for a command that returns a result with a value.
member.typeparam: The type of command to handle.
The type of value returned on success.

member.summary: Defines a handler for a command that returns a result without a value.
member.typeparam: The type of command to handle.

member.summary: Defines a handler for a query that returns a result with a value.
member.typeparam: The type of query to handle.
The type of value returned on success.
